content.situation: 教授在办公室初次见面，主动开启关于论文进展的对话，学生需要回应并表达当前状态和态度
content.speakerText: Hi, thanks for coming in. How's your paper coming along?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，谢谢你来。论文进展得怎么样？
content.responseTemplate: I'm ___ on the literature review, but I'm eager to get your feedback.
content.hint: 表达进展时，常用 'making good progress' 或 'struggling a bit'，避免笼统的 'good' 或负面情绪词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达进展状态的常用结构

content.situation: 教授在初次见面时鼓励学生分享论文中的困难，学生需要礼貌地承认挑战并表达改进意愿
content.speakerText: I know writing a paper can be tough. What part are you finding most difficult?
content.speakerTextCn: 我知道写论文不容易。你觉得最难的部分是哪个？
content.responseTemplate: I'm having some trouble with ___ , but I'm ready to revise it.
content.hint: 学术写作中常见的困难是论证结构、数据分析等，避免非学术性选项
content.knowledgePoint: 描述学术挑战的准确表达

content.situation: 教授在初次见面时表达支持态度，学生需要回应并表明积极的学习态度
content.speakerText: I'm here to help you improve. Let me know how I can support you.
content.speakerTextCn: 我在这里是为了帮你提升，告诉我我该如何支持你。
content.responseTemplate: Thank you. I really appreciate that. I'm ___ to learn and make improvements.
content.hint: 表达积极态度时，'eager to learn' 是学术场景中最自然、最推荐的表达
content.knowledgePoint: 表达学习意愿的核心词汇
